testcase.name: contextLoads

o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : SQL Warning Code: 0, SQLState: 00000 2025-08-26T15:04:28.305+05:30 WARN 16540 --- [ main] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : table "users" does not exist, skipping Hibernate: create table merchants ( created_by integer, is_active boolean, merchant_id integer generated by default as identity, updated_by integer, created_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, subscription_expires_at timestamp(6), updated_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, pincode varchar(10), gstin varchar(20), phone varchar(20), fssai_license varchar(50), subscription_plan varchar(50), business_type varchar(100), city varchar(100), country varchar(100), state varchar(100), website_url varchar(500), address TEXT, business_name varchar(255), email varchar(255) unique, merchant_name varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (merchant_id) ) Hibernate: create table otp_logs ( attempts_count integer not null, merchant_id integer, otp_log_id integer generated by default as identity, otp_code varchar(6) not null, created_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, expires_at timestamp(6) not null, verified_at timestamp(6), otp_type varchar(20) not null check (otp_type in ('LOGIN','REGISTRATION','PASSWORD_RESET','PHONE_VERIFICATION')), status varchar(20) not null check (status in ('SENT','VERIFIED','EXPIRED','FAILED')), ip_address varchar(45), phone varchar(255) not null, user_agent varchar(255), primary key (otp_log_id) ) Hibernate: create table permissions ( created_by integer, permission_id integer generated by default as identity, updated_by integer, created_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, action varchar(50) not null, permission_name varchar(100) not null unique, resource varchar(100) not null, description TEXT, primary key (permission_id) ) Hibernate: create table role_permissions ( created_by integer, permission_id integer not null, role_id integer not null, role_permission_id integer generated by default as identity, updated_by integer, created_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, primary key (role_permission_id), unique (role_id, permission_id) ) Hibernate: create table roles ( created_by integer, is_system_role boolean, role_id integer generated by default as identity, updated_by integer, created_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, role_name varchar(100) not null unique, description TEXT, primary key (role_id) ) Hibernate: create table user_roles ( created_by integer, merchant_id integer, role_id integer not null, updated_by integer, user_id integer not null, user_role_id integer generated by default as identity, assigned_at timestamp(6), created_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, expires_at timestamp(6), updated_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, primary key (user_role_id), unique (user_id, role_id, merchant_id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( created_by integer, date_of_birth date, email_verified boolean, is_active boolean, is_guest boolean, is_verified boolean, merchant_id integer, otp_attempts integer, phone_verified boolean, updated_by integer, user_id integer generated by default as identity, otp_code varchar(6), created_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, email_verified_at timestamp(6), guest_converted_at timestamp(6), last_login_at timestamp(6), otp_blocked_until timestamp(6), otp_expires_at timestamp(6), password_reset_expires_at timestamp(6), updated_on TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, gender varchar(10), phone varchar(20) not null, preferred_login_method varchar(20), user_type varchar(20), first_name varchar(100), last_name varchar(100), username varchar(100), profile_image_url varchar(500), address TEXT, email varchar(255), email_verification_token varchar(255), password_hash varchar(255), password_reset_token varchar(255), primary key (user_id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_users_merchant_phone on users (merchant_id, phone) Hibernate: create index idx_users_merchant_email on users (merchant_id, email) Hibernate: create index idx_users_phone on users (phone) Hibernate: create index idx_users_email on users (email) Hibernate: create index idx_users_active on users (is_active) Hibernate: alter table if exists otp_logs add constraint FK37rnnbm1agw0ykg8hm5rcmcp5 foreign key (merchant_id) references merchants Hibernate: alter table if exists role_permissions add constraint FKegdk29eiy7mdtefy5c7eirr6e foreign key (permission_id) references permissions Hibernate: alter table if exists role_permissions add constraint FKn5fotdgk8d1xvo8nav9uv3muc foreign key (role_id) references roles Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FK5weuepafkqdviecerw6mgvmvc foreign key (merchant_id) references merchants Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FKh8ciramu9cc9q3qcqiv4ue8a6 foreign key (role_id) references roles Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FKhfh9dx7w3ubf1co1vdev94g3f foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists users add constraint FKay3joh8dntu87ym5elbd0i8mw foreign key (merchant_id) references merchants 2025-08-26T15:04:28.488+05:30 INFO 16540 --- [ main]
